overall.description: A cinematic night scene from a cyberpunk video game featuring a futuristic circular plaza surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers. Giant holographic koi fish swim through the air around the buildings as the camera slowly rotates around the plaza, showcasing vibrant cyan and orange neon lighting against the dark urban environment.

events.description: blue holographic koi fish enters the scene from the left side

agents.ego_description: slowly rotating around the plaza observing the red holographic koi fish and surrounding cityscape

entered.detail: large glowing red-orange holographic koi fish swimming in the air
circular plaza with glowing cyan neon light trails and reflective wet surface
tall futuristic skyscrapers with illuminated windows and neon signage
vertical stack of colorful illuminated advertisements on building facade
tall building with prominent vertical yellow neon light strips

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at night, dominated by a large red holographic koi fish swimming through the air. The camera rotates slowly around the circular plaza, which features glowing cyan neon light trails on the ground. Tall skyscrapers with neon signage surround the open space, and midway through the segment, a blue holographic koi fish enters from the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular neon-lit plaza with dual holographic displays

events.description: red and blue holographic koi fish swim past each other in the center of the plaza
red holographic koi fish swims out of frame to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing to rotate around the plaza capturing both holographic fish swimming in the air

entered.detail: large glowing blue holographic koi fish with flowing fins

segments.scene_description: Both holographic koi fish are now visible, swimming in opposite directions around the plaza. The red fish moves toward the right side while the blue fish crosses the center from the left. The camera continues its clockwise rotation, showing the two fish passing each other before the red fish exits the frame, leaving the blue fish to dominate the center view.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular neon-lit plaza with holographic displays

events.description: red holographic koi fish re-enters from the left while blue fish moves to the right side

agents.ego_description: completing the rotation around the plaza as the holographic fish continue their circular swimming pattern

entered.detail: red holographic koi fish re-entering the frame from the left side

segments.scene_description: The blue holographic koi fish dominates the center of the frame as the red fish re-enters from the left. The camera continues rotating, showing both fish swimming in their perpetual loop around the neon-lit plaza. The red fish crosses back toward the right side while the blue fish settles into the center position, completing the cinematic loop as the scene returns to its initial state.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous clockwise rotation around a futuristic cyberpunk plaza, capturing the rhythmic dance of holographic koi fish amidst a neon-lit cityscape. It begins with a large red holographic koi swimming through the air above glowing cyan light trails on the ground, surrounded by towering skyscrapers with vibrant signage. As the camera rotates, a blue holographic koi enters from the left, and the two creatures glide in opposite directions across the center of the plaza. The scene then shifts as the red fish exits the frame, leaving the blue fish to dominate the view before the red fish re-emerges from the left to cross the space once more. Finally, the camera completes its circular path, showing both fish returning to their perpetual loop as the environment settles back into its initial cinematic state.
